question: Beyond recurring income streams and the recurring real spending schedule, does v1 model discrete, dated, one-time cashflow events — large inflows (inheritance, proceeds from selling the house, a bonus/RSU vest, a one-off gift) and large outflows (a child's college over a few years, a roof/car/wedding, a planned big purchase)? Today the domain has recurring income streams (701e81b4) with start/end dates and a single recurring real spending path (fb2dfbc8), plus real estate that is explicitly *not* drawn down (af999d56) — so 'sell the house at 78 and move the proceeds into taxable' or 'receive a $400k inheritance at 80' has no home in the model.
